bids.reasoning: The opponent opened with all valueE, which gives me minimum utility (0.2 across all issues, total utility = 0.2). This is very early (t=0.0), so I should open with my ideal bid to maximize utility. My top utility is achieved with all valueA across all issues, giving utility = 1.0. I'll start firm at my best offer since there's no time pressure yet.

The opponent started with all valueE (worst for me, utility = 0.2 each) and has barely moved, only shifting issueA from valueE to valueD. This is very early (t=0.02), so I should stay near my top bid. My max utility bid is all valueA (utility = 1.0). I'll hold firm at my best offer since there's no time pressure yet and the opponent is barely conceding.

We're very early in the negotiation (t=0.04), and the opponent is making minimal concessions - they started at all valueE (worst for me, utility ~0.2 each) and have barely moved. I'll maintain my maximum utility bid of all valueA, as conceding this early would be premature.

We're very early in the negotiation (t=0.06).
